title: Mini White Ceramic Mortar and Pestle Set, A Perfect Pill Crusher, Also Suitable for Crushing Spices, Herbs, etc
description:
About this item
[EFFICIENT] The mushroom-shaped pestle has more contact surfaces with the mortar, so it can finish the grinding work faster than the ordinary pestle and mortar.
[EFFORTLESS] 1. Gently vertically crush pills into pieces. 2. Press down and rotate to a fine powder. The bottom of the bowl is unglazed to prevent slipping.
[APPLICATION] This grinder can easily grind pills, spices, and herbs into fine powder. It is a must-have kitchen tool for the family.
[MATERIAL] It is made of high-quality porcelain, with exquisite texture, smooth surface, beautiful and compact. Microwave, oven and dishwasher safe up to 660 °F. Freezer safe as well.
[MEASURE BEFORE BUYING] This is a mini grinding bowl(3.1 inches, 0.8 OZ), small enough to carry anywhere. Please check the specification before order it
reviews_5s:
So cute but mighty. Does the job. I use it bc I am.on a lot of medication and the bigger pills need to be crushed. This is a cute little pill crusher that really crushes.I like the look of this small Mortal & Pestle in my kitchen. I had such a hard time trying to bite into my chewable Calcium tablets, I thought I would break my teeth. I actually stopped taking my Calcium until I received this product. It crushes large round, hard tablets with very little effort. My arthritic hands don't even notice the effort. I absolutely love this product.
Dr. BonnieReally happy with this purchase! Bought this for grinding large pills for my 65lb. American Staffordshire Terrier. She will not take them. This little mortar and pestle grinds them up quickly and evenly with little effort. Now we can mix them in with her food and she gets her medicine!
Very comfortable in the hand. It doesn't take up much space. It is heavy and solid for it's size. Easily cleans with mild dish soap. I haven't tried it in the dishwasher. It is a nice bright white and is actually very cute sitting on the kitchen counter. I do wish it came with a little brush for getting all the fine powder out, but that's about the only negative I can think of. Really nice for small tasks!! I highly recommend after shopping extensively and returning another.Perfect size for crushing those pills that my dogs are so good at spitting out.This is just what I love. A great but inexpensive product. This simple product has great design. This simple product has great function. And this simple product has a 195O's price. The mortar is nice and low to the ground so it won't ever tip over. The Pestle is small... but big and fat. It simply crushes everything. The design is also beautiful in its simplicity and extremely solid in its construction. I bought it for large solid pills which I am having trouble swallowing for some reason. These crush those perfectly. It might not be big enough for a large Mexican dinner... but for smaller portions it is simply ideal. And only 1O dollars. What a great deal for a great product. I am a very happy consumer.works well for what we used it forThis pill crusher works well and fits the hand nicely.Used this product to crush "extremely hard pills" that are also hard to swallow. Don't know what I have done without it!I have been using this set twice daily for grinding pills for my cat (I stir the resulting powder into his food). It makes a fine powder with no bigger fragments at all in seconds. It cleans easily in the dishwasher.

I imagine it would also be great for culinary tasks involving small ingredient amounts.

I could not be happier with the purchase. Recommended!Makes a great job of pill crushing
reviews_1s: I got this to crush up pills for our cat. It works fine for that except for one thing...The bottom of the grinder and the bowl are not smooth. For some reason the mfg decided to go with a rougher surface in these locations. The result is once a pill is crushed it sticks to the bowl and the grinder. STUPID! You have to try and scrape the crushed pill from the bowl and the grinder, wasting about 1/4 of what you crushed. NOT recommended.Didn’t feel safe using it for food. No matter what I tried it wouldn’t stop shedding white powder into everything. Ended up throwing it away.
